creator: abhay.rathod@quest.com
text:
We have following munin installed in FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE

munin-common-2.0.73            Common components between a munin node and server
munin-master-2.0.73            Collector part of Munin
munin-node-2.0.73              Node-specific part of Munin

Our issue is that the munin-cron is not being executed every 5 mins unless you touch munin-master.conf in /usr/local/etc/cron.d/

Any ideas why the munin-master.conf is not loaded automatically in cron after install?
